name: Seeker of Knowledge

sheet.name: Seeker of Knowledge
sheet.background_story:
Isk has sought the knowledge of these lands since the dawn of the 17th Cycle.

Few are old enough to recall, but Isk also welcomed the construction of The Green Knight's Farm. Originally Isk welcomed the opportunity for lowly wagdie to have some purpose in this world. However, Isk soon learned of the horrors that occur within this farm.

He has since retreated into the background. Best not draw attention to oneself during a street sweep.
